name: Tarpon Bus Ctr Inc
districts_or_customers: Pinellas County area (unconfirmed); possible Tarpon Springs schools
recent_news: No M&A, ownership, or operational news found in public sources; minimal online footprint.
fit_notes: Single-location micro-operator (~22 employees, ~$0.9M est. revenue) in Tarpon Springs FL; too small in isolation but could fit a Florida tuck-in roll-up if a route contract with Pinellas County Schools can be confirmed. Identity and operating status need direct outreach to verify.

name: Bowman Brothers Trucking Inc
districts_or_customers: Tri-Valley School District area (Schuylkill County, PA - historically; based on 1982 Tri-Valley HS yearbook ad)
recent_news: Cited in FMCSA enforcement action ($1,990 fine for drug/alcohol testing program violations, year unspecified). Founder-generation Fred 'Fritz' Bowman passed away; son Dan Bowman now President - classic succession signal for a century-old family business.
fit_notes: Century-old family-owned PA school bus + trucking operator in Schuylkill County; founder generation has passed, second-generation Dan Bowman now President - strong potential succession signal. Small scale (~28 employees) but exactly the profile for a Summit PA tuck-in if rural routes with Tri-Valley SD or nearby districts are confirmed.

name: Roettger Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Possible Somerset WI School District (St. Croix County) - unconfirmed
recent_news: No public news, M&A activity, or website found. Listed website 'Reliancepaydayloans.Com' in source data is clearly a data error / not a real company URL.
fit_notes: Very low online footprint; ~27 employees in Somerset WI suggests small family operator likely serving local district. WI is outside core Summit footprint but possible expansion. Needs direct phone outreach to confirm operating status, ownership, and contract relationship - too little public info for prioritization.

name: Elsa School Bus-Miami
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools (likely as M-DCPS approved private bus contractor); pickups documented from Kinloch Park Middle School
recent_news: Active on social media (Facebook/Instagram); no M&A or ownership change news. Note: 'Eli School Bus, Inc.' (Sunbiz P10000085775, officers Evelyn Gil and Scherezade Viera) is a separate entity at 8175 NW 8th St - not to be confused with Elsa.
fit_notes: Small Miami private school bus operator (~21 employees) operating in highly fragmented M-DCPS contractor pool. Not on the most recent approved-vendor list reviewed, so status as active M-DCPS contractor is unclear. Sub-scale on its own; would only be useful as part of a multi-operator Miami consolidation play.
